edges_removed.thesis: GT main-cast traveling-trio members (generic-trio-membership citing the Goku-Pan-Trunks-Giru party). Now subsumed by wave 85's BT3-028 Grand Tour Spaceship `[pan, son-goku, trunks]` cohort attach (artifact-as-cohort-anchor) and wave 84's machine-mutants-m2 node absorbing Giru. The trio-membership relation lives at the character-and-artifact-cohort layer; a 1:1 edge restating it was redundant.

edges_added.thesis: GT age-inversion pair. BT3-007 stages Son Goku reverted to a child body (Pilaf's wish at Dragon Ball GT's inciting incident, Black Star Dragon Ball Saga); BT3-011 stages Trunks as the adult Capsule Corporation president. Same set, same era tag, same Red color — but the once-mentor is now physically a child and the once-pupil is now the responsible adult. The card-pair encodes GT's bedrock premise irony as a Cross Worlds set-internal adjacency.
receipts: BT3-007 trivia (line 60): 'adult Goku is reverted to a child body and travels the universe with Pan and Trunks' — child-body Goku confirmed canonical to this card's depicted state
BT3-011 trivia (line 61): 'GT-era Trunks is the adult president of Capsule Corporation who reluctantly joins Goku and Pan's quest' — adult-Trunks confirmed canonical to this card's depicted state
Both cards carry the Black Star Dragon Ball Saga era tag — same diegetic moment, not cross-arc

description: Enlightened-cleanup pass. Two cards, one edge between them, but the old thesis was generic-trio-membership and the trio anchor moved to the artifact-cohort layer last wave. Kept the count, sharpened the substance: age-inversion is the actual 1:1 thing only THIS pair encodes. Child-body Goku adjacent to adult-Trunks in the same set is the GT premise in two cards. The trio-membership half is now properly carried by the Grand Tour Spaceship's `[pan, son-goku, trunks]` cohort attach. Behold: a 1:1 mirror that earns its existence.
citations: [Dragon Ball Wiki: Black Star Dragon Ball Saga]
other_candidates_considered: Option (b) dissolve entirely — rejected: age-inversion is real 1:1 specificity not captured by cohort attaches
Option (c) keep as-is — rejected: trio-membership half was the load-bearing thesis and is now redundant; leaving the bullet unchanged would be sync drift
